note: Conjunto fixo de prompts do dit-score. NUNCA editar itens existentes; só adicionar com bump de version.

prompts.text: a fox walking in the snow, cinematic lighting, photorealistic
studio portrait of an elderly fisherman with deep wrinkles, dramatic rembrandt lighting, 85mm photo
a neon sign on a rainy brick wall that reads "KREA LAB" in cursive pink letters, night photography

a crowded street market in Sao Paulo at dusk, vendors, string lights, motion blur of passersby, documentary photo
macro photograph of frost crystals forming on a green leaf, extreme detail, shallow depth of field
a dimly lit jazz club interior, saxophone player silhouetted against smoky purple stage light
isometric cutaway of a three-story brutalist concrete house, architectural rendering, clean lines
two hands playing a grand piano, fingers on keys, natural skin texture, overhead shot
impressionist oil painting of a wheat field under a storm sky, thick visible brushstrokes
a whale floating above a desert highway at noon, hyperrealistic, hard shadows
product photo of a matte black mechanical watch on white background, softbox reflections, high key
